panels.title: Jobs Assigned
panels.description: Jobs assigned to runners (waiting to start)

panels.title: Jobs Running
panels.description: Jobs currently executing

panels.title: Job Start Rate
panels.description: Rate jobs are being started (per second)

panels.title: Job Completion Rate
panels.description: Rate jobs are completing (per second)

panels.title: Black Hole Detector (Assigned vs Running)
panels.description: Growing gap = jobs queued but not executing

panels.title: Avg Job Startup Latency
panels.description: Time from assignment to execution start

panels.title: Avg Job Execution Duration
panels.description: How long jobs take once running

panels.title: Job Throughput
panels.description: Starts >> Completions = jobs piling up

panels.title: Node Provisioning & Termination
panels.description: Karpenter node churn rate

panels.title: Compactor: Managed vs Tainted Nodes
panels.description: Tainted nodes = marked for consolidation

panels.title: Compactor: Pending Compatible Pods
panels.description: Pods waiting for compatible nodes. Rising = capacity pressure

panels.title: BuildKit: Active Sessions
panels.description: Active build connections through HAProxy

panels.title: BuildKit: Connection Errors
panels.description: Non-zero = builders unreachable or overloaded

panels.title: Harbor Health
panels.description: Harbor overall health (requires monitoring deploy)

panels.title: Harbor Projects
panels.description: Total Harbor projects (proxy cache registries)

panels.title: Harbor: Image Pulls
panels.description: Pull rate by project (docker.io, ghcr.io, etc.)

panels.title: PyPI Cache
panels.description: nginx-exporter scrape target health

panels.title: PyPI Cache: Request Rate
panels.description: HTTP request rate per pypi-cache instance

panels.title: PyPI Cache: Active Connections
panels.description: Active client connections per pypi-cache instance

panels.title: Git Cache: Fetch & Sync Errors
panels.description: Non-zero = git cache degraded, clones will be slower

panels.title: Git Cache: Repo Freshness
panels.description: Seconds since last successful fetch. High = stale cache

panels.title: Control Plane Memory
panels.description: Working set memory by control-plane namespace
